---
title: "GeojsonLoader"
description: "Load thematic features from GeoJSON and align them to reference data"
author: "Karel Dieussaert"
date: "2026-01-14"
categories: [Loader, GeojsonLoader]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
---
# GeojsonLoader
This example focuses on [GeoJsonLoader](../reference/GeoJsonLoader.qmd) as a practical loader for in-memory GeoJSON.

## What you learn

1. How to load thematic GeoJSON into `Aligner`.
2. How to fetch reference geometries (GRB) and run `process(...)`.
3. How to export and visualize the resulting aligned geometries.

## Why this matters

Most integrations already have GeoJSON available through APIs or preprocessing pipelines. This loader is usually the fastest way to connect those datasets to `brdr`.

## Notes

- Ensure the input `id_property` matches your feature properties.
- The example calls `save_results(...)` and visualization helpers, useful for quick QA.

```{python}
#| fig-cap: "basic example"
{{< include ../../examples/example_geojsonloader.py >}}
```
